title: The Curse of the Hope Diamond

scenes.text: A gem that brings misfortune to all who possess it.
The Hope Diamond is housed in the Smithsonian National Museum of Natural History.
Stolen from King Louis XVI's treasury during the French Revolution.
Many owners experienced tragedy and loss.
scenes.label: TRAGIC LEGACY

scenes.text: Follow if you'd have cracked this one.

description: 📍 Washington D.C., USA - 1791. The Hope Diamond, a stunning gemstone, holds a dark history tied to misfortune for its owners. Explore the tragic tales surrounding it. Follow for daily cold cases!
